zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Crassus於大約1163年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利時，她的父親William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury19歲，母親Lady Margaret Marshal16歲。她去世於1247年6月14日在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Crassus于大约1163年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利时，她的父亲William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury19岁，母亲Lady Margaret Marshal16岁。她去世于1247年6月14日在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Crassus was born about 1163, in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, her father, William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury, was 19 and her mother, Lady Margaret Marshal, was 16. She died on 14 June 1247, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Crassus est née environ 1163, à Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Marshal, avait 16 ans. Elle est décédée le 14 juin 1247, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Crassus um 1163 in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Marshal 16. Sie starb am 14. Juni 1247 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Dudley, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Crassus è nata il circa 1163 nel Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Marshal, aveva 16 anni. Morì il 14 giugno 1247, nel Dudley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 85 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Crassus(이)가 대략 1163년 영국 그루스스터실르 치핀그 소드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Marshal(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1247년 6월 14일 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Crassus родилась около 1163 г. в местности чиппинг содбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William III Crassus Lord of Chipping Sodbury было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Marshal, 16. Она умерла 14 июня 1247 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет.
